claim: Hermes agent memory system can query specific past conversations by date using the fuzzy index and 1-hour prompt cache to maintain lower token limits
actionable: Create a soul.md file with your context manual (who you are, where you live) and connect Obsidian or Pinecone to enable Hermes to dynamically search your personal knowledge base during conversations.
source_title: 100 hours of Hermes Agent lessons in 23 minutes

claim: Background tasks in Hermes allow parallel execution of multiple concurrent research or reasoning tasks without interruption using the /background command
actionable: Use /background followed by your query to spin up background research tasks that won't interrupt other queries you send; chain multiple background prompts for parallel exploration.
source_title: 100 hours of Hermes Agent lessons in 23 minutes

claim: Hermes cron jobs enable scheduled morning briefs that can call a 'dreaming sequence' to generate AI-generated recommendations based on all conversation history, meetings, and available systems
actionable: Set up a cron job in Hermes with /cron to schedule a morning brief at 8 AM that includes a 6 AM dreaming sequence, allowing Hermes to analyze all context and provide three core recommendations plus one non-negotiable daily action.
source_title: 100 hours of Hermes Agent lessons in 23 minutes

claim: Super goals extend standard Hermes goals by introducing a human-AI handshake, breaking tasks into bite-size chunks with assigned actions to either the user or the agent, preventing drift from original intent
actionable: Use the super goal system (available in Jack's dashboard) to set longer-term goals; it breaks them into chunks and explicitly assigns actions to either you or Hermes, maintaining clarity through iterative work.
source_title: 100 hours of Hermes Agent lessons in 23 minutes

claim: Hermes can switch between multiple LLM models mid-conversation using /model command, enabling model delegation for specialized tasks (e.g., Grok for X searches, Claude Opus for design)
actionable: Use /model to view current model and switch between available models; delegate research to cheaper/faster models and use expensive models only for high-value reasoning tasks.
source_title: 100 hours of Hermes Agent lessons in 23 minutes

claim: Grok model integration via XAI provides real-time X/Twitter access within Hermes, allowing agents to identify viral trends and most-shared content over recent periods without relying on external APIs
actionable: Connect Grok via /model xai in Hermes CLI to enable queries about current X trends; use for content research and viral pattern detection without rate-limiting concerns.
source_title: 100 hours of Hermes Agent lessons in 23 minutes

claim: Hermes agents should be backed up daily to private GitHub repositories to enable device portability; daily snapshots preserve the full agent state including memory and configurations
actionable: Set up a daily cron job in Hermes to create snapshots and back them up to a private GitHub repository; this enables seamless migration if you change devices.
source_title: 100 hours of Hermes Agent lessons in 23 minutes

claim: Mission control operating system in Hermes provides visual tracking of average usage, connected models, memory status, and proactive recommendations based on conversation history and scheduled tasks
actionable: Use the mission control template (available in community) to gain visual oversight of your Hermes instance; set it up to show memory metrics, model usage, and proactive daily suggestions.
source_title: 100 hours of Hermes Agent lessons in 23 minutes

claim: Running Hermes locally on personal hardware provides better security than VPS deployments when using Docker containers to isolate access; local deployment avoids cloud exposure and network routing risks
actionable: Choose to run Hermes locally on your personal device rather than a VPS; if sharing system access is a concern, use Docker to create isolated containers that limit agent access to specific folders.
source_title: 100 hours of Hermes Agent lessons in 23 minutes

claim: Firecrawl reduces web scraping costs by 80% compared to traditional methods by semantically parsing HTML pages; it's a cost-effective alternative for internet search in agentic systems
actionable: Use Firecrawl for web searches in Hermes instead of default search tools to reduce API costs and improve the quality of extracted information from web pages.
source_title: 100 hours of Hermes Agent lessons in 23 minutes

claim: AntiGravity CLI is replacing the deprecated Gemini CLI and provides access to Gemini multimodal models; it supports reading images, videos, and long-form content with superior multimodal capabilities
actionable: Download and install AntiGravity CLI (replaces Gemini CLI) to gain access to Gemini's multimodal capabilities; use for video analysis and image-heavy tasks.
source_title: 100 hours of Hermes Agent lessons in 23 minutes
